module.name: IPL
module.note: Verified by host. Updatable questions flagged.

questions.q: In which year was the Indian Premier League founded?
questions.fact: The IPL was founded by the BCCI in 2007 and the first season was played in 2008.

questions.q: Who is known as the Father of IPL?
questions.fact: Lalit Modi conceptualised and launched the IPL in 2008 as BCCI Vice President.

questions.q: Which team won the very first IPL title in 2008?
questions.fact: Rajasthan Royals, led by Shane Warne, won the inaugural IPL in 2008.

questions.q: How many overs are bowled per side in an IPL match?
questions.fact: IPL follows the T20 format — each team bats for a maximum of 20 overs.

questions.q: Which team won the most IPL titles in the first 10 years of IPL?
questions.fact: Mumbai Indians won the IPL 3 times from 2008 to 2017. CSK and KKR won it 2 times each till then.

questions.q: Which player has won the most IPL matches as captain?
questions.fact: MS Dhoni has captained 235 matches for CSK in IPL and won 136 of them.

questions.q: What does IPL stand for?
questions.fact: IPL stands for Indian Premier League, organised by the BCCI.

questions.q: Which iconic stadium in Mumbai is the home ground of Mumbai Indians?
questions.fact: Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai is the home of Mumbai Indians with a capacity of around 33,000.

questions.q: Which team is nicknamed Yellow Army?
questions.fact: Chennai Super Kings are known as the Yellow Army due to their iconic yellow jersey.

questions.q: Which team is known by the nickname MI?
questions.fact: MI is the universally recognised short form for Mumbai Indians.

questions.q: Who captained Rajasthan Royals to their 2008 IPL title?
questions.fact: Shane Warne led Rajasthan Royals to a surprise title in the inaugural IPL season of 2008.

questions.q: Which team won the IPL in 2024?
questions.fact: Kolkata Knight Riders won their third IPL title in 2024, beating Sunrisers Hyderabad in the final.

questions.q: The Eden Gardens stadium is the home of which IPL team?
questions.fact: Eden Gardens in Kolkata is the home of Kolkata Knight Riders and one of cricket's iconic venues.

questions.q: Which team won the IPL in 2023?
questions.fact: Chennai Super Kings won their fifth IPL title in 2023, beating Gujarat Titans in the final.

questions.q: How many teams currently play in the IPL from 2022?
questions.fact: The IPL expanded to 10 teams in 2022 with the addition of Gujarat Titans and Lucknow Super Giants.

questions.q: Which team did MS Dhoni lead to multiple IPL titles?
questions.fact: MS Dhoni led Chennai Super Kings to 5 IPL titles — 2010, 2011, 2018, 2021 and 2023.

questions.q: Which broadcaster holds the television rights for IPL in India?
questions.fact: Star Sports holds the television broadcast rights for IPL in India.

questions.q: Which team is known as RCB?
questions.fact: RCB stands for Royal Challengers Bengaluru, one of the original IPL franchises.

questions.q: Which team won the IPL 2025 title?
questions.fact: Royal Challengers Bengaluru won their first-ever IPL title in 2025, ending a long wait for their passionate fanbase.

questions.q: Which team won back-to-back IPL titles in 2019 and 2020?
questions.fact: Mumbai Indians won back-to-back titles in 2019 and 2020, their 4th and 5th IPL championships.

questions.q: Who is the all-time leading run scorer in IPL history?
questions.fact: Virat Kohli is the all-time leading run scorer in IPL history with over 9,000 runs.

questions.q: Who has taken the most wickets in IPL history?
questions.fact: Yuzvendra Chahal holds the record for most wickets in IPL history with over 230 wickets.

questions.q: MS Dhoni is famously associated with which IPL team throughout his career?
questions.fact: MS Dhoni has been synonymous with Chennai Super Kings throughout the IPL, winning 5 titles as captain.

questions.q: Which batsman holds the record for most sixes in a single IPL season?
questions.fact: Vaibhav Suryavanshi hit 65 sixes in IPL 2026 — the most in a single IPL season.

questions.q: Who scored the first century in IPL history?
questions.fact: Brendon McCullum scored 158* off 73 balls for Kolkata Knight Riders in the very first IPL match in 2008.

questions.q: Rohit Sharma has captained which IPL team to the most titles?
questions.fact: Rohit Sharma captained Mumbai Indians to 5 IPL titles — 2013, 2015, 2017, 2019 and 2020.

questions.q: Which player is known as Universe Boss in IPL?
questions.fact: Chris Gayle earned the nickname Universe Boss for his explosive batting in IPL and T20 cricket globally.

questions.q: AB de Villiers played for which IPL team throughout most of his career?
questions.fact: AB de Villiers represented Royal Challengers Bengaluru for most of his IPL career, forming a legendary partnership with Virat Kohli.

questions.q: Who was the captain of KKR when they won their first IPL title in 2012?
questions.fact: Gautam Gambhir led KKR to their first IPL title in 2012 and again in 2014.

questions.q: Which legendary spinner captained Rajasthan Royals to the 2008 IPL title?
questions.fact: Shane Warne's tactical brilliance guided an underdog Rajasthan Royals to win the inaugural IPL.

questions.q: Lasith Malinga is famous for which type of delivery in IPL?
questions.fact: Lasith Malinga is the master of toe-crushing yorkers.

questions.q: What is the highest individual score in IPL history?
questions.fact: Chris Gayle scored 175* off 66 balls for RCB vs Pune Warriors in 2013.

questions.q: Which player has won the most IPL titles overall as a player?
questions.fact: Rohit Sharma has won 6 IPL titles — 5 with Mumbai Indians (2013, 2015, 2017, 2019, 2020) and 1 with Deccan Chargers (2009).

questions.q: Suresh Raina was known as Mr IPL — which team did he represent?
questions.fact: Suresh Raina was one of CSK's most consistent performers and earned the Mr IPL tag for his prolific run-scoring.

questions.q: Which team did Virat Kohli make his IPL debut for?
questions.fact: Virat Kohli has played for Royal Challengers Bangalore since the very first IPL season in 2008.

questions.q: Which player has played the most matches for Chennai Super Kings?
questions.fact: MS Dhoni has played the most matches for Chennai Super Kings, with well over 250 appearances since the team's inception.

questions.q: Which bowler took the highest wickets in the first IPL season 2008?
questions.fact: Sohail Tanvir was the highest wicket-taker in IPL 2008 and played a key role in Rajasthan's title win.

questions.q: Who captained Delhi Capitals to their first IPL final appearance in 2020?
questions.fact: Shreyas Iyer captained Delhi Capitals to the IPL final in 2020, where they lost to Mumbai Indians.

questions.q: Which player famously announced retirement from IPL just before finals during CSK's 2023 title win?
questions.fact: MS Dhoni hinted his retirement mid-season in 2023 but continued playing. Ambati Rayudu actually announced his IPL retirement during the 2023 season.

questions.q: Hardik Pandya captained which team to the IPL title in their debut season 2022?
questions.fact: Hardik Pandya led Gujarat Titans to the IPL title in their very first season in 2022.

questions.q: What is the highest team score ever in IPL history?
questions.fact: Sunrisers Hyderabad scored 287/3 against RCB in 2024 — the highest team total in IPL history.

questions.q: Which player has hit the most sixes in overall IPL history?
questions.fact: Chris Gayle holds the record for most sixes in IPL history with over 350 sixes.

questions.q: What is the highest individual score in a single IPL innings?
questions.fact: Chris Gayle scored 175* off 66 balls for RCB vs Pune Warriors India in 2013.

questions.q: Which bowler has the best bowling figures in a single IPL match?
questions.fact: Alzarri Joseph took 6/12 on his IPL debut for Mumbai Indians against SunRisers Hyderabad in 2019.

questions.q: Which IPL team has the most appearances in IPL finals?
questions.fact: Chennai Super Kings have appeared in the most IPL finals, reflecting their consistent excellence.

questions.q: How many runs did Virat Kohli score in IPL 2016 — a single season record?
questions.fact: Virat Kohli scored a record 973 runs in IPL 2016 for RCB, including 4 centuries.

questions.q: Which teams have won the most IPL titles as of 2025?
opts: Both MI and CSK have 5 each
questions.fact: Both Mumbai Indians and Chennai Super Kings have won the IPL 5 times each as of 2025.

questions.q: What is the fastest fifty in IPL history in terms of balls?
questions.fact: Yashasvi Jaiswal (RR, 2023) and Urvil Patel (CSK, 2026) both scored the fastest fifty in 13 balls.

questions.q: Which IPL season was played entirely in the UAE due to COVID-19?
questions.fact: IPL 2020 was held entirely in the UAE — Dubai, Abu Dhabi and Sharjah.

questions.q: How many IPL centuries has Virat Kohli scored — the most by any player?
questions.fact: Virat Kohli has scored 9 IPL centuries — the most by any batsman. Four came in 2016 alone.

questions.q: Which player scored four consecutive centuries in IPL 2016?
questions.fact: Virat Kohli scored 4 centuries in IPL 2016 for RCB — an unprecedented feat in T20 cricket.

questions.q: What is the lowest team total ever in IPL history?
questions.fact: Royal Challengers Bengaluru were bowled out for 47 against Kolkata Knight Riders in 2017 — the lowest IPL team total.

questions.q: Which team won IPL 2022 in their debut season?
questions.fact: Gujarat Titans won the IPL in their debut season in 2022 under Hardik Pandya.

questions.q: Which player has played the most matches in IPL history?
questions.fact: Virat Kohli has played 280+ IPL matches and is the most capped IPL player currently.

questions.q: Who was the first player to score 1000 runs in a single IPL season?
opts: No one has scored 1000 runs in a single season
questions.fact: No player has scored 1000 runs in a single IPL season. Virat Kohli came closest with 973 in 2016.

questions.q: Which IPL team has the record for winning the most consecutive matches in a single season?
questions.fact: Kolkata Knight Riders won 9 consecutive matches in IPL 2014 on their way to winning the title.

questions.q: In which year did the Deccan Chargers win the IPL title?
questions.fact: Deccan Chargers won the IPL in 2009, with Adam Gilchrist playing a key role as captain.

questions.q: Which Indian batsman hit 6 sixes in an over in an IPL match?
opts: No Indian batsman has hit 6 sixes in an IPL over
questions.fact: No Indian has hit 6 sixes in one IPL over. However, Riyan Parag hit 6 consecutive sixes across different overs vs KKR in 2025.

questions.q: Which wicketkeeper has the most dismissals in IPL history?
questions.fact: MS Dhoni has the most wicketkeeper dismissals in IPL history, reflecting his outstanding glovework.

questions.q: How many wickets did Yuzvendra Chahal take in IPL 2022 to win the Purple Cap?
questions.fact: Yuzvendra Chahal took 27 wickets in IPL 2022 for Rajasthan Royals to win the Purple Cap.

questions.q: Which Bollywood actor co-owns the Kolkata Knight Riders franchise?
questions.fact: Shah Rukh Khan, along with Juhi Chawla, co-owns Kolkata Knight Riders since the IPL's founding in 2008.

questions.q: Which businessman owns the Chennai Super Kings franchise?
questions.fact: N. Srinivasan, former BCCI President, owns Chennai Super Kings through his company India Cements.

questions.q: The Mumbai Indians are owned by which business family?
questions.fact: Mumbai Indians are owned by Reliance Industries, headed by Mukesh Ambani.

questions.q: Which IPL team is based in Hyderabad and wears orange jerseys?
questions.fact: Sunrisers Hyderabad wear distinctive orange jerseys and play at Rajiv Gandhi International Cricket Stadium.

questions.q: Which two new teams were added to the IPL in 2022?
opts: Pune Supergiants and Rising Pune Supergiant
Gujarat Titans and Lucknow Super Giants
questions.fact: Gujarat Titans and Lucknow Super Giants were added in 2022, taking the IPL to 10 teams.

questions.q: Which team did Kings XI Punjab rename themselves to?
questions.fact: Kings XI Punjab rebranded to Punjab Kings in 2021.

questions.q: What is the home ground of Royal Challengers Bengaluru?
questions.fact: RCB play at M. Chinnaswamy Stadium in Bengaluru, known for its flat pitch and short boundaries.

questions.q: Which IPL franchise was bought for the highest price at the 2022 auction?
questions.fact: The Lucknow Super Giants franchise was sold for approximately Rs 7,090 crore at the 2022 IPL franchise auction.

questions.q: Delhi Capitals were previously known by which name?
questions.fact: Delhi Capitals were known as Delhi Daredevils from 2008 to 2018 before rebranding in 2019.

questions.q: Which team has the nickname Knight Riders?
questions.fact: Kolkata Knight Riders, co-owned by Shah Rukh Khan, are nicknamed the Knight Riders.

questions.q: Which franchise was suspended from the IPL for two seasons 2016-2017?
questions.fact: Both Chennai Super Kings and Rajasthan Royals were suspended for two seasons due to the IPL spot-fixing scandal.

questions.q: Which team replaced Chennai Super Kings temporarily during their 2-year suspension?
questions.fact: Rising Pune Supergiant replaced Chennai Super Kings during their two-year ban in 2016 and 2017.

questions.q: Sunrisers Hyderabad replaced which franchise in 2013?
questions.fact: Sunrisers Hyderabad replaced the defunct Deccan Chargers franchise in 2013.

questions.q: Which team does Bollywood actress Preity Zinta co-own?
questions.fact: Preity Zinta is a co-owner of Punjab Kings, formerly Kings XI Punjab.

questions.q: What colour jerseys does Mumbai Indians wear?
questions.fact: Mumbai Indians wear blue and gold jerseys — colours inspired by their city's identity.

questions.q: Which IPL team is based in the city of Jaipur?
questions.fact: Rajasthan Royals are based in Jaipur and play home matches at Sawai Mansingh Stadium.

questions.q: Nita Ambani is prominently associated with which IPL franchise?
questions.fact: Nita Ambani, wife of Mukesh Ambani, is a key figure in the Mumbai Indians ownership.

questions.q: Which franchise has never won the IPL title as of 2026?
questions.fact: Punjab Kings came very close — losing finals in 2014 and 2025 — but have never won the IPL title.

questions.q: How many times did Deccan Chargers win the IPL?
questions.fact: Deccan Chargers won the IPL once, in 2009, before the franchise was terminated in 2012.

questions.q: Which franchise is owned by the RP-Sanjeev Goenka Group?
questions.fact: The RP-Sanjeev Goenka Group owns Lucknow Super Giants, one of the two franchises added in 2022.

questions.q: Which two bowlers share the record for most runs conceded in a single IPL over?
opts: Both Prasanth Parameswaran and Harshal Patel
questions.fact: Prasanth Parameswaran conceded 37 runs to Chris Gayle in 2011 and Harshal Patel conceded 37 runs to Ravindra Jadeja in 2021.

questions.q: Who was the first Orange Cap holder in IPL history?
questions.fact: Shaun Marsh won the first Orange Cap in IPL 2008, scoring 616 runs in 11 matches.

questions.q: How many teams participated in the very first IPL season in 2008?
questions.fact: 8 teams participated in the inaugural IPL 2008 season.

questions.q: Which player won the Player of the Tournament award in IPL 2016?
questions.fact: Virat Kohli won the Player of the Tournament in IPL 2016 after his record-breaking 973-run season.

questions.q: Who holds the record for most dismissals by a wicketkeeper in a single IPL season?
questions.fact: Jos Buttler holds the record for most dismissals in a single IPL season.

questions.q: In which IPL season was the Strategic Time Out first introduced?
questions.fact: The Strategic Time Out was introduced in IPL 2009. Originally 7.5 minutes, it was reduced to 2.5 minutes from 2010 onwards.

questions.q: Who scored the fastest century in IPL history?
questions.fact: Chris Gayle scored the fastest IPL century off just 30 balls for RCB against Pune Warriors in 2013.

questions.q: In which year was the current Eliminator and Qualifier playoff format introduced in IPL?
questions.fact: The current playoff format — Qualifier 1, Eliminator, Qualifier 2, Final — was introduced in IPL 2011.

questions.q: Murali Vijay and which other batsman famously opened for CSK in multiple IPL seasons?
questions.fact: Michael Hussey and Murali Vijay were a prolific opening pair for Chennai Super Kings in the early IPL seasons.

questions.q: Which spinner holds the all-time record for most hat-tricks in IPL history?
questions.fact: Amit Mishra has taken the most hat-tricks in IPL history — three in total.

questions.q: What was the base price of Sam Curran when he became the most expensive buy at IPL 2023 auction?
questions.fact: Sam Curran was sold for Rs 18.5 crore at IPL 2023 auction — the most expensive player at that auction.

questions.q: Who was the first player to win 4 IPL titles with the same franchise?
questions.fact: Rohit Sharma was the first player to win 4 IPL titles with the same franchise and went on to win a 5th.

questions.q: The DRS Decision Review System was introduced in IPL in which year?
questions.fact: DRS was introduced in IPL in 2018, allowing teams to challenge on-field umpiring decisions.

questions.q: Which IPL team did MS Dhoni lead to the 2010 Champions League T20 title?
questions.fact: MS Dhoni led Chennai Super Kings to win the Champions League T20 in 2010 and again in 2014.

questions.q: How did Mumbai Indians win the 2019 IPL final against CSK?
opts: Kieron Pollard hit the winning run
Lasith Malinga took the last wicket
MI batted first and won by 1 run
questions.fact: Mumbai batted first and won by just 1 run. Lasith Malinga bowled an off-cutter that trapped Shardul Thakur LBW off the last ball.

questions.q: Which bowler took the first hat-trick in IPL history?
questions.fact: Lakshmipathy Balaji achieved this on May 10, 2008, playing for Chennai Super Kings against Kings XI Punjab.

questions.q: The Mankading controversy became big in which IPL season?
questions.fact: Ravichandran Ashwin ran out Jos Buttler by Mankading in IPL 2019 (KXIP vs RR), sparking a huge debate.

questions.q: Which player was the most expensive buy at the IPL 2022 mega auction?
questions.fact: Ishan Kishan was bought by Mumbai Indians for Rs 15.25 crore at the IPL 2022 mega auction.

questions.q: Which country does IPL star Pat Cummins represent internationally?
questions.fact: Pat Cummins is Australia's Test and ODI captain and has played for KKR, Delhi Daredevils and SRH in the IPL.

questions.q: Which Indian player has scored 150+ runs in an IPL innings?
questions.fact: KL Rahul joins Chris Gayle and Brendon McCullum as the third player to score 150 plus in IPL history.
